items.name: Jawaz-Keyzor/DarkGPT
items.full_text: Unrestricted ChatGPT client with built-in jailbreak presets, web interface, and streaming API. No content filters, no refusals, no ethical blocks. Open source.

items.name: 0xSero/codex-shim
items.full_text: Local Responses-API shim that exposes Factory BYOK models (and optional ChatGPT GPT-5.5 passthrough) to Codex Desktop.

items.name: Jawaz-Keyzor/Valorant-External-Assistant-2026
items.full_text: External gameplay overlay for Valorant. Provides visual assistance through radar ESP and sound indicators. Works via secondary display capture — no injection, no memory access. Educational project for studying rendering overlays and computer vision techniques.

items.name: DEEIX-AI/DEEIX-Chat
items.full_text: An enterprise AI workspace for model routing, multimodal chat, files, tools, billing, identity, and operations.

items.name: c4pt0r/pie
items.full_text: Rust port of the pi agent harness — coding agent + LLM runtime stack
